"[15] 1039 INVLD PTY - OCCD MARKHAM X CARROL - CHP OFFICER HIGH SPEEDS THROUGH PLOT - CAUSED RP TO SUDDENLY BRK AND GO DOWN ON ELECTRIC BIKE - RP ADV IF HE DIDN'T STOP OFFICER WOULD HAVE HIT HIM // CHP OFFICER TOLD RP THAT HE HAD TO GO TO A EMERG CALL - ASKED IF HE WAS OKAY AND OFFERED TO BUY HIM NEW SWEATPANTS BUT LEFT"
"[12] RP ADV CHP OFFICER NEAR TC W/ SON"
"[3] RP SON WAS ON ELECTRIC BIKE AND OFFICER "SPED" OUT OF PLOT FOR RED MART PLOT AND NEAR TC W/ SON - CAUSED HIM TO GO DOWN"
